code:
import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line = io.read_to_end()
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < tokens.len()
    let tok = tokens.get(i)
    match tok
    when Some(t)
      match string.parse_int(t)
      when Some(n)
        if n > 0
          nums = list.push(nums, n)
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  match list.max(nums)
  when Some(m)
    print("max=#{m}")
  when None
    print("none")
  end
  Ok(())
end
